summary: Phase 3B (Month-End Summary Screen) verified on Web preview at mobile viewport 390x844. All required testIDs render, navigation works, count-up animates to final money value, category breakdown lists top-4 categories with bars, share button is tappable without crash, and Continue navigates back to the dashboard. Empty/edge months render zero state without crashing. Regression: Home dashboard reloads with THIS MONTH, MONTHLY OVERVIEW chart, Recent list and the 4 bottom tabs (Home/Expenses/Groups/Insights) visible. vs-last-month and streak cards correctly hidden when their data thresholds are not met (seed-data only spans current month June 2026 — see context_for_next_testing_agent).

react_native_issues.issue: Uses deprecated `pointerEvents="none"` prop on the glow <View>. Triggers RN-web warning `props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents`. Reference: /app/frontend/app/month-summary.tsx:108

action_items: (Low) Move `pointerEvents="none"` from prop to style on the glow View in month-summary.tsx:108 to silence the RN-web deprecation warning (style={{ pointerEvents: 'none' }} or use the new prop on style).

(Optional) Manually verify vs-last-month + streak cards on a real device where backdated expenses exist (seed data on web is all current-month only, so prevTotal=0 → comparison card correctly hidden, and streak=0 → streak card correctly hidden). Code path is correct but was not exercised end-to-end.
critical_code_review_comments: month-summary.tsx is well-scoped (~280 lines), uses StyleSheet.create, all text wrapped in <Text>, all interactive elements have testID, no hardcoded URLs, no ObjectId leakage (local-only app).
getMonthSummary/getPreviousMonthTotal in db.ts correctly exclude `Income` category from totals and compute categoryBreakdown sorted desc — verified visually (Grocery first at ₹1,250 for June 2026).
showComparison = prevTotal > 0 — correctly suppresses the comparison card when previous month has no spend (verified for May 2026 → no `vs April` card).

Count-up animation uses requestAnimationFrame + 1200ms ease-out cubic; final hero value matches summary.totalExpenses (₹3,248 for June 2026 = 349+800+649+1250+200 - 200 transport not summed? Actually it equals 3248 = 349+800+649+1250+200=3248 ✓).
Top-4 limit via summary.categoryBreakdown.slice(0,4) correctly hides 5th category (Transport ₹200 not shown for June 2026 — expected).
StatusBar is hidden on month-summary screen as designed; root Stack registers month-summary with animation:'fade' and gestureEnabled:false.

success_rate.frontend: ~100% (all required testIDs + flows verified; vs-last-month/streak cards not data-positive but code branches are correct)

seed_data_creation: Used the app's auto-seed (5 expenses in current month June 2026: Food/Fuel/Entertainment/Transport/Grocery totaling ₹3,248). No external seed needed — the test correctly targeted year=2026&month=5 to hit populated state, year=2026&month=4 for empty state, year=2020&month=0 for far-past edge case.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Today's date in the preview environment is around June 22, 2026 (not Jan 2026 as the problem statement assumed). Therefore the seed-data days-ago dates land in JUNE 2026, not January. Use /month-summary?year=2026&month=5 to hit the populated state. month=4 (May 2026) is empty. The vs-last-month comparison card only renders when prevTotal>0, which requires the previous month to have at least one non-Income expense — not satisfied by seed data alone. To exercise it, add a backdated expense via Add Expense flow for a previous month. Web storage = AsyncStorage backed by IndexedDB (db name 'AsyncStorage'); direct localStorage.setItem bypassing the abstraction does NOT work. Pre-existing RN-web warnings (shadow* deprecated, expo-notifications web shim, Image.resizeMode) are unrelated to Phase 3B.
rca_of_issue: No bug RCA needed — Phase 3B implementation passes all verification steps. Only one minor deprecation warning surfaced (pointerEvents prop) which is documented in action_items.
